steps.title: Identify the most important information in the notes
steps.content: The notes state: “She is best known for a 2011 YouTube video that has been viewed over two million times.” The task is to accurately convey what Annie Wu is most noted for, using only details supported by the notes.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
• "Annie Wu, who has won multiple national flute competitions, has also combined flute playing and beatboxing.": Foregrounds competitions rather than the YouTube video the notes identify as her best-known achievement. ✗
  • "Among her many achievements, prominent American flutist Annie Wu graduated from the New England Conservatory and has won multiple national flute competitions.": Emphasizes education and competitions; omits the YouTube video entirely. ✗
  • "Annie Wu is best known for a 2011 YouTube video performance of Three Beats for Beatbox Flute that has been viewed over two million times.": Uses the exact phrase “is best known for,” names the year, platform, title, and view count — all details from the notes. ✓
  • "Composer Greg Pattillo's original work Three Beats for Beatbox Flute combines flute playing and beatboxing.": Shifts focus to the composer Greg Pattillo rather than Annie Wu. ✗
That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
